approvedUse: Download to the configured cockpit pipeline cache for source inspection
Record source package hashes, archive contents, mesh formats, and texture metadata
Import into Blender only after download succeeds and source package records are updated

notes: Owner selected the top-ranked Sketchfab A320 Cockpit 2 candidate as the base cockpit candidate. Download is approved for cache-only inspection, but the official Sketchfab download API requires authentication.
